docs.title: Assembly Finder
docs.text: Assembly finder is a Snakemake-powered cli to download genomes with NCBI datasets.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
mamba (recommended)dockergit 
mamba create -n assembly_finder assembly_finder

Note

Requires a mamba installation

docker pull ghcr.io/metagenlab/assembly_finder:latest

Note

Add --no-use-conda when using the container

git clone https://github.com/metagenlab/assembly_finder.git
pip install -e assembly_finder

Note

Requires a mamba installation

docs.title: Command
docs.text:
standardcontainer 
assembly_finder -i staphylococcus_aureus -nb 1 

docker run ghcr.io/metagenlab/assembly_finder:latest \
assembly_finder -i staphylococcus_aureus -nb 1 --no-use-conda

docs.title: Small datasets
docs.text:
• Staphylococcus aureus reference genome

Note

By default, assembly_finder limits genomes to reference or representative

assembly_finder -i staphylococcus_aureus -nb 1
  • Any Staphylococcus aureus genome
assembly_finder -i staphylococcus_aureus -nb 1 --reference False
  • Download from a list of taxa
assembly_finder -i 1290,1813735,114185 -o taxa -nb 1
  • Download using a taxa table
taxa.tsv taxon nb 1290 1 1813735 1 114185 1 
assembly_finder -i taxa.tsv

docs.title: Big datasets
docs.text:
Warning

These examples are for big datasets downloads, so using an NCBI api-key is highly recommended

  • Download all chlamydia genomes
assembly_finder -i chlamydia --api-key <api-key>
  • Best ranking genome for each bacteria species
assembly_finder -i bacteria --api-key <api-key> --rank species --nrank 1
  • Complete RefSeq bacteria viruses and archaea (excluding MAGs and atypical)
assembly_finder -i bacteria,viruses,archaea -o outdir --api-key <api-key> --source refseq --assembly-level complete --mag exclude --atypical
  • Specific bioproject
assembly_finder -i PRJNA289059 --api-key <api-key> --accession

docs.title: Inputs
docs.text: Input can be either a string or a table, and queries can be either taxa or accession as shown in NCBI datasets docs.

docs.title: Strings
docs.text:
TaxonsAccessions

Note

Taxons can be either taxids or taxon names

assembly_finder -i 1290,staphylococcus_aureus,562 -nb 1 -o taxons

assembly_finder --accession -i GCF_003812505.1,GCF_000418345.1,GCF_000157115.2 -o accessions

docs.title: Tables
docs.text:
TaxonsAccessions

Note

You can set the number of genomes per taxon in the table

taxon nb 1290 1 staphylococcus_aureus 1 562 1

Note

The accession table does not have a header

GCF_003812505.1 GCF_000418345.1 GCF_000157115.2

docs.title: Download directory
docs.text:
Downloaded files (compressed fasta files by default) are located in the download directory as shown below

Table with assembly informations such as assembly level, reference category, checkM and BUSCO completeness, sequencing technology, number of contigs ...

Note

I removed comments, biosample.sample_ids, biosample.attributes, biosample.lineage and biosample.comments for visual clarity
